name: Shells
tooltip: <D>> Dominant foundation specific, activates after killing an enemy:</>
<D>BISON</>
<F1>> Combat Focus: </><C>50%</> increased weapon accuracy and <C>25%</> increased speed + dexterity for <C>5 s</> on receiving direct vitals damage, <C>10 s</> cooldown
<F2>> Flow State: </>Core activates without cost for <C>2.5 s</> on performing a wall dive or flip within <C>1 s</> of starting a climb, <C>15 s</> cooldown
<F3>> Locked In: </>Melee damage + firearm headshots gain <C>0-50%</> defense bypass proportional to remaining vitals, from <C>100-25%</>
<D>DRAGON</>
<F1>> Thermal Transfer: </><C>50%</> of defense gained from Backdraft or burn + explosive damage received is restored to vitals
<F2>> Superheated: </>Backdraft + Ground Slam gain <C>25%</> increased damage + range. Backdraft, Ground Slam + backup weapon damage applies combust
<F3>> Crossfeed: </>Aerial maneuvers + hover no longer drain aux power or consume charges for <C>5 s</> on receiving chemical heal
<D>GHOST</>
<F1>> Safety Measures: </>Gain <C>25</> temporary defense during Opportunity, clear burn on camouflage activation, <C>50%</> reduced explosive damage received while camouflage active
<F2>> Hidden Asset: </>Interacting + throwing devices no longer deactivates camouflage. Deep camouflage no longer stuns on taking damage, gains enhanced vision + undetectable while active
<F3>> Shadow Operative: </>Hip firing supressed firearms + attacking with backup weapons no longer deactivates camouflage
<D>HYDRA</>
<F1>> Overstimulated: </>Gain an Adrenal Feedback stack every <C>20 s</>, increases maximum stacks by <C>5</>
<F2>> Feedback Loop: </>All visible kills while Core active gain an Adrenal Feedback stack.  Reaching <C>5</> stacks fully restores defense + Core charge
<F3>> Post-Kill Clarity: </>Gain enhanced vision and firearms + backup weapons bypass all damage reductions for <C>5 s</> on kill, duration extended while dealing damage, <C>10 s</> cooldown
<D>RHINO</>
<F1>> Power Relay: </><C>40 /s</> defense + aux power regeneration while disabled. Gain Overcharge during active Core if activated while disabled or Overcharged
<F2>> Force Trauma: </>Shockwave gains <C>50%</> increased range, debuff duration + knockback force, applies stun + cripple

<F3>> Reverberate: </>Backup weapon damage disables for <C>1 s</> + deals <C>0-25%</> additional shock damage proportional to remaining defense, from <C>0-100%</>. Overcharge for <C>2 s</> on dealing melee or body impact damage
